title: squilla undulata
intro: Squilla undulata, also known as Black Squill or Sea Squill, is a plant species in the Asparagaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Squilla undulata include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of fever. Herbal preparations of Squilla undulata typically involve the use of its bulbs and leaves, often dried or powdered, to be made into teas, tinctures, or topical creams for medicinal purposes.
